title: Titan's Amulet applies Modifier plus ten

card.rawText: Inflict 10 damage to your primary creature. For 1 turn cycle add Modifier: +10.

plan.title: Titan's Amulet applies Modifier plus ten
plan.summary: Equip Titan's Amulet to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the +10 Modifier affects hit and attack damage.

notes: Use a modifier-zero attacker and high-HP defender so the +10 Modifier is easy to inspect.

steps: Player 1 equips Titan's Amulet to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect hit modifier and attack damage.
manualVerification: Confirm the separate 10 self-damage effect and 1-turn-cycle expiry are covered independently.
riskNotes: The deterministic damage roll is 1; the equipped Modifier +10 makes the first strike deal 11.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Titan's Amulet equipped Modifier bonus.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
